name: fluencyloop
description: Stay fluent in the code your AI agent writes with a per-feature design, build, teaching, and review loop.

interface.shortDescription: Stay fluent in AI-assisted code changes.
interface.longDescription: Design features before building, teach the important decisions at each slice, journal the rationale, and assemble a reviewer-ready PR view.
defaultPrompt: Start a FluencyLoop feature for this change
Plan this large initiative with FluencyLoop
Prepare this FluencyLoop feature for review
